words.def: stay clear from; keep away from; keep out of the way of someone or something
words.zh: v. 避開, 避免, 預防( avoid的第三人稱單數 ); [法律]宣佈（判決、抗辯等）無效; 使無效; 廢止, 撤銷

words.def: stay clear from; keep away from; keep out of the way of someone or something
words.zh: vt. 避免, 防止, 撤消

words.def: a public promotion of some product or service
words.zh: [計] 精確定義系統, 先進除錯系統, 模擬數字子系統, 應用設計服務
n. 幫助, 外援, 助手

words.def: experiencing or showing sorrow or unhappiness; ; - Christina Rossetti
words.zh: a. 憂愁的, 悲哀的
